recalls.Description:
Magnetic chess games are being recalled due to safety concerns related to small, loose magnets that can pose a serious ingestion risk to children. These games are packaged in a blue box featuring the terms "Magnetic", "Magnetic Chess Piece", and "Intelligence Strategy Game". Each set contains 20 loose magnets, a yellow string, gameplay instructions, and a plastic storage bag, which can lead to dangerous situations if ingested.

The magnets in these chess games do not meet the mandatory safety standards for toys, making them a hazard for young children. If swallowed, these high-powered magnets can attract each other or other metal objects, potentially causing severe internal injuries, including intestinal blockages and perforations, which can be life-threatening.
recalls.Title: Recall of Magnetic Chess Games Due to Serious Injury Risk from Loose Magnets
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further information, contact Kaiwenshangpin via email at Kaiwenshangpinrecall@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Magnetic Chess Game
Recalled Magnetic Chess Game (front of box)
Recalled Magnetic Chess Game (back of box)
Recalled Magnetic Chess Game (game contents)

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from August 2025 to November 2025 for approximately $13.

Importers.Name: Yiwushixiuxiangfushiyouxiangongsi ("Yiwu Xiu Xiang Garment Co., Ltd.") dba Kaiwenshangpin, of China

Remedies.Name: Stop using the product, keep it away from children, and dispose of it for a full refund

recalls.metaDescription: Magnetic chess games recalled due to ingestion risk from loose magnets. Immediate action required for safety.

recalls.Description: A recall has been issued for Christmas-themed magnetic chess games due to safety concerns regarding loose magnets that can pose a serious ingestion hazard to children. Each game includes 20 magnets, a red string, instructions, and a red drawstring storage bag, featuring holiday graphics such as Santa Claus and snowmen. The packaging displays 'Merry Christmas' along with the word 'Magnetic' on the back.
recalls.Title: Recall of Christmas-Themed Magnetic Chess Games Due to Serious Magnet Ingestion Risks

Images.Caption: Recalled Christmas-themed Magnetic Chess Game - packaging
"Magnetic" is printed on the back of the recalled Christmas-themed magnetic chess games
Recalled Christmas-themed Magnetic Chess Game - Contents
Recalled Christmas-themed Magnetic Chess Game - instructions

Retailers.Name: Available for purchase on Amazon.com from November 2024 through November 2025 for approximately $7.

Importers.Name: Shenzhenshiyiruikejiyouxiangongsi (Shenzhenshi Yirui Technology Co., Ltd.), dba Yiruikeji2024, of China

Hazards.Name: The magnetic chess games have been found to violate safety standards for toys, as they contain loose magnets that can be ingested. If swallowed, these powerful magnets can attract each other or other metal items, leading to serious health risks such as intestinal perforations, blockages, blood poisoning, and potentially fatal outcomes.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are urged to stop using the recalled magnetic chess games immediately, keep them away from children, and reach out to Yiruikeji2024 for a full refund. A photo of the disposed product will be required to process the refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of Christmas-themed magnetic chess games due to ingestion hazards. Contact Yiruikeji2024 for refunds and safety information.

recalls.Description: Surveying Accessories Cheaper has issued a recall for Colombia-themed magnetic board games due to safety concerns. These games feature a two-sided board, a storage bag, 32 colorful magnetic pieces, and two dice, with packaging that included a piece of chocolate. The games are labeled with 'Colombia que linda eres' on the board and 'Cositas Colombianas' on the storage box. Only the four- and six-player versions are affected by this recall.
recalls.Title: Recall of Colombia-themed Magnetic Board Games Due to Serious Injury Risk from Magnet Ingestion
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled magnetic board games and keep them away from children. For assistance, contact Surveying Accessories Cheaper at 305-336-6042, available from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or email zlipgo.sales@gmail.com for a pre-paid shipping label to return the games for a full refund.

Images.Caption: Recalled Surveying Accessories Cheaper Magnetic Game – Colombia que linda eres game board
Recalled Surveying Accessories Cheaper Magnetic Game – Colombia que linda eres game board
"Cositas Colombianas" is printed on the front of the recalled Board Game box

Retailers.Name: Centro Envíos Aventura in Miami, Florida, and online at Amazon.com.

Distributors.Name: Surveying Accessories Cheaper, of Miami, Florida

Hazards.Name: Risk of serious injury or death from ingestion of high-powered magnets.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the games and return for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Important recall of Colombia-themed magnetic board games due to ingestion hazards. Stop using immediately and contact for a refund.

recalls.Description: JinJiang Baimei is recalling its Multifunctional Puzzle Crab Toys due to a significant risk of injury or death from ingestion hazards. This toy set includes a magnetic fish hook, eight magnetic pieces, four plastic puzzle pieces, and a plastic mallet. The model number 'HY-99' can be found on the bottom of the packaging, which is labeled 'Multifunctional Puzzle' on both the front and back.
recalls.Title: JinJiang Baimei Recalls Multifunctional Puzzle Crab Toys Due to Serious Ingestion Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should reach out to JinJiang Baimei Co. Ltd at xmjytc@gmail.com for assistance.

Images.Caption: Recalled Multifunctional Puzzle Crab Toy Fishing Hook and Magnetic Pieces
Recalled Multifunctional Puzzle Crab Toy
Front of the Package of the recalled Multifunctional Puzzle Crab Toy

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively online at Walmart.com from November 2023 to January 2025 for approximately $27.

Importers.Name: Lucky Bird Inc., of Buffalo, New York

Distributors.Name: JinJiang Baimei Co. Ltd, of China

Hazards.Name: Ingestion hazard due to high-powered magnets

Remedies.Name: Return the toy for a full refund using a pre-paid label provided by JinJiang Baimei

recalls.metaDescription: JinJiang Baimei recalls Multifunctional Puzzle Crab Toys due to ingestion hazards. Contact for refunds and safety information.

recalls.Description: The 6-in-1 Pounding Game, featuring a wooden frame with a frog clock, colorful gears, and animal-faced pegs, has been recalled due to a serious safety concern. This toy includes a bird with a strong magnet in its beak that can detach, creating a potential ingestion hazard for children. If swallowed, the magnet can attract other metallic objects, leading to severe health risks including intestinal blockage and infection.
recalls.Title: Recall of 6-in-1 Pounding Game Due to Ingestion Risk from Loose Magnet; Sold Exclusively on Temu.com
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact DMITOY via email at dmitoy202405@163.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled 6-in-1 Pounding Game Sold by Dmitoy
Recalled 6-in-1 Pounding Game Sold by Dmitoy (Front of Box)
Recalled 6-in-1 Pounding Game Sold by Dmitoy (Game Contents)

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively online at Temu.com from May 2024 to July 2024 for approximately $20.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the toy and dispose of it safely for a full refund

recalls.metaDescription: Recall alert: 6-in-1 Pounding Game poses ingestion risk due to a loose magnet. Stop using it and contact DMITOY for a refund.

recalls.Description: The recall pertains to magnetic chess games that include 20 small, spherical magnets which can pose a choking hazard. These games are packaged in a blue box labeled with terms such as 'Magnetic', 'Magnetism', or 'Magnetism Intelligence Strategy Game'. Each set contains approximately 20 loose magnets, a string, a plastic storage tray, and gameplay instructions. The strong magnetic flux of these pieces raises safety concerns, particularly for children.
recalls.Title: Recall of Magnetic Chess Games Due to Ingestion Risks and Federal Regulation Violations
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Outad Good Life via email at pdhnfgjg@163.com or send a message through the 'message' icon on Temu's seller profile. Additional information can be found in the 'Your Recalls and Product Safety Alerts' section on Temu at www.temu.com.

Products.Name: Magnetic Chess Game Set with 20 Magnet Pieces

Images.Caption: Recalled 1 Set Puzzle Magnetic Battle Chess with 20 Magnetic Pieces
Packaging of the recalled 1 Set Puzzle Magnetic Battle Chess Game (Front of Box)
Recalled 1 Set Puzzle Magnetic Battle Chess Game contents

Injuries.Name: None reported. CPSC estimates 2,400 magnet ingestions were treated in hospital emergency departments from 2017 through 2021. CPSC is aware of seven deaths since 2005 involving the ingestion of hazardous magnets, including two outside of the United States.

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively online at Temu.com from December 2023 to February 2024 for approximately $8.

Distributors.Name: Outad Good Life Ltd., of China

Hazards.Name: Ingestion hazard due to strong magnets that can cause serious internal injuries if swallowed.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use immediately, keep the product away from children, and contact Outad Good Life for a full refund. Alternatively, they can access their Temu account, locate the order under 'Your Orders', and initiate a return through the 'Return/Refund' option. Detailed return instructions are available on the Return and Refund Policy page at Temu.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Magnetic chess games recalled due to ingestion risks. Stop use immediately and contact Outad Good Life for a full refund.

recalls.Description: Lovevery has issued a recall for specific units of the 2023 Slide & Seek Ball Runs, which are wooden toys featuring a plastic ball ramp included in the Babbler Play Kits designed for toddlers aged 13 to 15 months. The affected Ball Runs have a wooden knob on the door, lack the Lovevery logo on the bottom, and do not display a green sticker on the inside wall of the door where the knob is located.
recalls.Title: Lovevery Recalls Slide & Seek Ball Runs Due to Choking Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can visit Lovevery's recall page at www.recallrtr.com/ballrun or www.lovevery.com/pages/product-recalls. They may also call 888-520-0167 toll-free from 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or email ballrun@lovevery.com for further information.

Products.Name: Slide & Seek Ball Runs
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 47,000 (In addition, about 4,500 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Slide & Seek Ball Run
Recalled Slide & Seek Ball Run with The Babbler Play Kit packaging

Injuries.Name: Lovevery has received 33 reports of the wooden knob detaching during shipping and six reports of the wooden knob detaching after shipment. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available online at Lovevery.com as part of the Babbler Play Kit from June 2023 to November 2023, priced around $120.

Hazards.Name: Choking hazard due to potential detachment of the wooden knob.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should stop using the recalled ball run immediately, keep it away from children, and contact Lovevery for a free replacement. To receive a replacement, users must register on the website, mark the affected door with a specific case number (provided via email), upload a photo of the marked door to www.recallrtr.com/ballrun, and confirm that the door will be discarded. Lovevery will reach out to all known purchasers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: Lovevery recalls Slide & Seek Ball Runs due to choking hazards. Immediate action required for affected products.

recalls.Description:
Huihuang Trading Inc. is recalling its Fishing Games due to a serious hazard involving magnets that can be ingested. The game comprises nine animal pieces, four toy fishing rods, four toy fishing nets, a set of four markers, game instructions, and a waterproof storage bag. The batch number X002903XZT323 is located on the side of the game box, indicating the affected products.

The recalled fishing games do not meet federal toy safety regulations, as they contain magnets that can fit into small parts and are stronger than allowed. If swallowed, these magnets can attract to each other or other metal objects, potentially leading to severe health complications, including intestinal blockages or perforations, infections, and even death.
recalls.Title: Huihuang Trading Recalls Fishing Games Due to Magnet Ingestion Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should contact Huihuang Trading Inc. via email at safety@operationagency.com for assistance.

Images.Caption: Recalled Fishing Game (front of box)
Recalled Fishing Game (back of box)
Recalled Fishing Game (top of box)
Recalled Fishing Game

Injuries.Name: None reported. CPSC estimates 2,400 magnet ingestions were treated in hospital emergency departments from 2017 through 2021. CPSC is aware of seven deaths since 2005 involving the ingestion of hazardous magnets, including two outside of the United States.

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively online at Amazon.com from June 2023 to July 2023, priced between $20 and $25.

Importers.Name: Huihuang Trading Inc., of Parker, Colorado

Remedies.Name: Stop using the game immediately, keep it away from children, and contact Huihuang Trading for a pre-paid return label. A full refund will be issued upon receipt of the returned products.

recalls.metaDescription: Huihuang Trading recalls Fishing Games due to magnet ingestion hazards. Immediate action required for safety.
